name: MultiSensor AI Holdings, Inc.
summary: PARTI . Business Overview We build and deploy integrated condition monitoring and early threat detection solutions that connect multiple sensor types through a unified edge-to-cloud software architecture. Our software platform integrates multiple sensing modalities such as thermal, visual and acoustic, among others.
